name: od-contribute
title: Open Design Contributor
description: Ship a Skill, Design System, plugin, translation, doc fix, or bug report to nexu-io/open-design — without writing code. The agent introspects your local OD project, fills the manifest from what's already there, and opens a real PR.

description_i18n.en: Ship a Skill, Design System, plugin, translation, doc fix, or bug report to nexu-io/open-design — without writing code. The agent introspects your local OD project, fills the manifest from what's already there, and opens a real PR.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 把你做的 Skill、Design System、plugin、翻译、文档修复或 bug 上报到 nexu-io/open-design — 不用写代码。Agent 自动读你本地的 OD project,把 plugin manifest 填满,然后开一个真 PR。

query.en: I want to contribute to Open Design.
query.zh-CN: 我想给 Open Design 做贡献。
